title: Generating novel scientific hypotheses with Co-Scientist
summary: Co-Scientist is a Gemini-based multi-agent AI system developed by Google DeepMind to generate, debate, and refine novel scientific hypotheses. The system addresses hypothesis bottlenecks in scientific discovery by helping researchers connect disparate facts and formulate testable ideas.
